name: Red Velvet Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cake: Cream the butter and sugar; add eggs, and beat well. Add the red food coloring and water.
Sift together the flour, salt, baking soda, and cocoa. Add to the creamed mixture with buttermilk and vanilla. Mix in vinegar lightly.
Grease and flour two (9-inch) round cake pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
Frosting: With an electric mixer, beat all ingredients together until light and creamy.
Cream Cheese Frosting is delicious on this cake.
